title: How do you create a project template to copy for other projects?

posts.author: relativelynew (relatively new)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am new to Monday.com. I created a folder and I put everything I need in there.
Then I faced the harsh truth that monday.com does not allow you to make copies of folders. So everything I did so far went to garbage.

My question to others, how do you create a template project then make copies of it for each of your clients if you cant make copies of folders?

Thanks.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @relativelynew - Welcome to the community!

I made a video clip to explain some of the options you have for building templates. I hope you find this helpful to get you started: more-with-monday-workspace_...
